# LLM Context - React Native Expo Template

## What This Project Is

A production-grade React Native Expo base template. It provides a complete, working foundation for building mobile applications with authentication, theming, internationalization, API integration, error handling, and testing.

The project is designed to be the most AI-friendly React Native template available. All patterns are codified in documentation and rule files that AI tools can read.

## Tech Stack

Framework: React Native 0.83.2 with Expo SDK 55
Routing: expo-router (file-based, typed routes like Next.js but for React Native)
Language: TypeScript 5.9 with strict mode enabled
Styling: react-native-unistyles 3.x (design token system with light/dark modes)
Server State: @tanstack/react-query (data fetching, caching, mutations)
Client State: Zustand (auth session, UI state, user preferences)
Backend: Supabase (auth + database) with graceful degradation if unconfigured
HTTP Client: Axios with request/response interceptors
i18n: react-i18next with English and Arabic locales, RTL support
Storage: react-native-mmkv (fast synchronous persistent storage)
Forms: react-hook-form + zod/v4 (schema-first validation)
Testing: Jest + jest-expo
Linting: ESLint 9 flat config + Prettier

## Path Aliases

@/* maps to src/*
~/* maps to app/*

Always use these aliases. Never use relative paths that climb more than one directory level.

## Directory Structure

app/                          Expo Router file-based screens
  _layout.tsx                 Root: GestureHandlerRootView > ErrorBoundary > QueryProvider > BottomSheetModalProvider > AppContent
  +not-found.tsx              404 screen
  (main)/_layout.tsx          Main stack
  (main)/(tabs)/_layout.tsx   Tab bar layout
  (main)/(tabs)/index.tsx     Home tab screen
  (main)/(tabs)/settings.tsx  Settings tab screen

src/
  common/components/          33 shared UI components (see Components section)
  config/env.ts               Centralized env vars via EXPO_PUBLIC_* prefix
  features/                   Feature modules (auth is the example)
    auth/
      components/             LoginForm, RegisterForm
      services/authService.ts login, register, logout, getSession
      schemas/loginSchema.ts  Zod schemas
  hooks/
    useBottomPadding.ts       Safe area bottom padding
    useNetworkStatus.ts       Network connectivity alerts
    useProtectedRoute.ts      Redirects unauthenticated users to login
    useScreenDimensions.ts    Responsive screen size helpers
  i18n/
    config.ts                 i18next init (reads saved language from MMKV, falls back to device locale)
    locales/en.json           English translations
    locales/ar.json           Arabic translations
  integrations/supabase.ts    Supabase client (null if env vars missing)
  providers/
    index.ts                  QueryProvider export
    auth/authStore.ts         useAuthStore (Zustand) + useAuthInit hook
    query/mmkvPersister.ts    React Query persistence via MMKV
  services/api/client.ts      Axios instance with auth + error interceptors
  theme/
    light-theme.ts            Light mode color tokens (indigo primary, teal accent)
    dark-theme.ts             Dark mode color tokens
    metrics.ts                rf(), hs(), vs(), spacing, borderRadius, iconSize, fontSize
    themeManager.ts           Theme initialization from storage
  types/                      Global TypeScript types
  utils/storage/
    storage.ts                MMKV wrapper (getItem, setItem, removeItem)
    useStorage.ts             React hooks: useStorage, useStorageBoolean
    constants.ts              STORAGE_KEYS object

## The 33 Shared Components

All in src/common/components/. Import from barrel: import { Button } from '@/common/components/Button'

Action:
  Button - variant: primary/secondary/outline/ghost, size: sm/md/lg, loading, disabled, leftIcon, rightIcon, fullWidth
  IconButton - icon-only button, variant: primary/secondary/outline/ghost, size: sm/md/lg, accessibilityLabel required

Data Display:
  Avatar - image/initials/icon fallback, size: xs/sm/md/lg/xl
  Badge - variant: solid/outline/dot, colorScheme: primary/success/error/warning/info, count, maxCount
  Card - variant: default/elevated/outlined, pressable, onPress
  Chip - label, variant: solid/outline, selected, onPress, onClose, icon, disabled
  ListItem - title, subtitle, left, right, onPress, divider, disabled
  Text - variant: h1/h2/h3/body/bodySmall/caption/label/overline, weight, color, align

Disclosure:
  Accordion - items array (id/title/content/disabled), multiple, defaultExpanded

Feedback:
  EmptyState - title, message, icon, actionLabel, onAction
  ErrorBoundary - children, fallback (React class component boundary)
  Loading - message, fullScreen, size: small/large
  ProgressBar - value 0-100, size: sm/md/lg, colorScheme, indeterminate
  Skeleton - variant: text/circle/rect, width, height, animated
  Snackbar - visible, message, variant: default/success/error, duration, action, onDismiss

Form:
  Checkbox - checked, onChange, label, disabled
  FormField - name, control (RHF), label, required, children (wraps RHF Controller)
  Input - label, error, helperText, disabled, leftIcon, rightIcon (extends TextInputProps)
  RadioGroup - value, onChange, options array (value/label/disabled), orientation: vertical/horizontal
  SearchBar - value, onChangeText, placeholder, onSubmit, onClear, loading, autoFocus
  SegmentedControl - value, onChange, options array (value/label/icon), size: sm/md, disabled
  Select - value, onChange, options array (label/value/disabled), label, placeholder, error, disabled
  Switch - value, onValueChange, label, disabled
  TextArea - extends Input minus secureTextEntry, numberOfLines, maxLength, showCount

Layout:
  Divider - orientation: horizontal/vertical, bold, inset
  ScreenContainer - scrollable, padded, edges: top/bottom, style (use as screen root)

Overlay:
  Dialog - visible, onDismiss, title, message, actions array (label/onPress/variant), children
  Menu - visible, onDismiss, anchor, items array (label/onPress/icon/disabled/destructive)

Typography:
  Icon - name (Ionicons), variant: primary/secondary/tertiary/muted/inverse/accent, size, color

## Theme Color Tokens

Light mode values:

brand.primary = #6366F1 (indigo)
brand.secondary = #1E293B (dark slate)
brand.tertiary = #14B8A6 (teal)
brand.primaryVariant = #4F46E5

background.app = #F8FAFC
background.surface = #FFFFFF
background.surfaceAlt = #F1F5F9
background.elevated = #FFFFFF
background.input = #F1F5F9
background.disabled = #E2E8F0
background.modal = #FFFFFF

text.primary = #0F172A
text.secondary = #334155
text.tertiary = #64748B
text.muted = #94A3B8
text.inverse = #FFFFFF
text.accent = #14B8A6
text.link = #6366F1

border.default = #E2E8F0
border.subtle = #F1F5F9
border.strong = #CBD5E1
border.focus = #6366F1
border.disabled = #E2E8F0

icon.primary = #6366F1
icon.secondary = #1E293B
icon.tertiary = #94A3B8
icon.muted = #CBD5E1
icon.inverse = #FFFFFF
icon.accent = #14B8A6

state.success = #10B981
state.successBg = #ECFDF5
state.error = #EF4444
state.errorBg = rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12)
state.warning = #F59E0B
state.warningBg = rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12)
state.info = #3B82F6
state.infoBg = rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12)

overlay.modal = rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
overlay.pressed = rgba(99,102,241,0.12)
overlay.hover = rgba(99,102,241,0.08)
overlay.ripple = rgba(255,255,255,0.25)

## Metrics and Spacing

Spacing (horizontal, via hs() scaling):
theme.metrics.spacing.p4 = hs(4)
theme.metrics.spacing.p8 = hs(8)
theme.metrics.spacing.p12 = hs(12)
theme.metrics.spacing.p16 = hs(16)
theme.metrics.spacing.p20 = hs(20)
theme.metrics.spacing.p24 = hs(24)
theme.metrics.spacing.p32 = hs(32)
theme.metrics.spacing.p48 = hs(48)
theme.metrics.spacing.p64 = hs(64)
theme.metrics.spacing.p120 = hs(120)

Spacing vertical (via vs() scaling): same keys under theme.metrics.spacingV.*

Border radius:
theme.metrics.borderRadius.xs = hs(4)
theme.metrics.borderRadius.sm = hs(6)
theme.metrics.borderRadius.md = hs(8)
theme.metrics.borderRadius.lg = hs(12)
theme.metrics.borderRadius.xl = hs(16)
theme.metrics.borderRadius.full = 999

Icon sizes:
theme.metrics.iconSize.xs = hs(14)
theme.metrics.iconSize.sm = hs(16)
theme.metrics.iconSize.md = hs(18)
theme.metrics.iconSize.lg = hs(20)
theme.metrics.iconSize.xl = hs(24)

Font sizes (responsive via rf()):
theme.fonts.size.xxs = rf(10)
theme.fonts.size.xs = rf(12)
theme.fonts.size.sm = rf(14)
theme.fonts.size.md = rf(16)
theme.fonts.size.lg = rf(18)
theme.fonts.size.xl = rf(20)
theme.fonts.size.2xl = rf(24)
theme.fonts.size.3xl = rf(30)
theme.fonts.size.4xl = rf(36)

## Critical Patterns

### StyleSheet (ALWAYS unistyles, ALWAYS theme callback)

import { StyleSheet } from 'react-native-unistyles';

const styles = StyleSheet.create((theme) => ({
  container: {
    padding: theme.metrics.spacing.p16,
    backgroundColor: theme.colors.background.surface,
    borderRadius: theme.metrics.borderRadius.md,
  },
}));

### Auth Store (Zustand, selectors required)

import { useAuthStore } from '@/providers/auth/authStore';
const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);
const session = useAuthStore((s) => s.session);
const isAuthenticated = useAuthStore((s) => s.isAuthenticated);
// Outside React: useAuthStore.getState().session

### API Client (Axios with interceptors)

import { api } from '@/services/api';
const data = await api.get<Product[]>('/products').then((r) => r.data);
const item = await api.post<Product>('/products', payload).then((r) => r.data);

### React Query (server state)

import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
export function useProducts() {
  return useQuery({
    queryKey: ['products'],
    queryFn: () => api.get<Product[]>('/products').then((r) => r.data),
  });
}

### Zustand (client state)

import { create } from 'zustand';
export const useMyStore = create<MyState>((set) => ({
  items: [],
  addItem: (item) => set((state) => ({ items: [...state.items, item] })),
}));
// Always use selectors: useMyStore((s) => s.items) not useMyStore()

### i18n (all UI strings must be translated)

const { t } = useTranslation();
<Text>{t('home.welcome')}</Text>
// Update BOTH en.json AND ar.json

### Forms

import { z } from 'zod/v4';
const schema = z.object({ email: z.email('validation.emailInvalid') });
type FormData = z.infer<typeof schema>;
const { control, handleSubmit } = useForm<FormData>({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) });

### Storage

import { useStorage } from '@/utils/storage';
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from '@/utils/storage/constants';
const { value, setValue } = useStorage<string>(STORAGE_KEYS.preferences.language);

### Screen template

import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next';
import { StyleSheet } from 'react-native-unistyles';
import { ScreenContainer } from '@/common/components/ScreenContainer';
import { Text } from '@/common/components/Text';

export default function MyScreen() {
  const { t } = useTranslation();
  return (
    <ScreenContainer scrollable padded>
      <Text variant="h1">{t('screen.title')}</Text>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create((theme) => ({
  // styles here
}));

### Feature module structure

src/features/<feature>/
  components/   - Feature-specific UI
  services/     - Pure async API functions (no React)
  hooks/        - useQuery/useMutation wrappers + custom hooks
  stores/       - Zustand stores (if needed)
  types/        - TypeScript interfaces
  schemas/      - Zod validation schemas
  constants/    - Constants

## Hard Rules (Never Violate)

1. Never use import { StyleSheet } from 'react-native' - must be react-native-unistyles
2. Never use inline styles: style={{ padding: 16 }} is always wrong
3. Never use color literals: '#6366F1' or 'white' in styles
4. Never hardcode UI strings: <Text>Hello</Text> - use t('key')
5. Never use any types - TypeScript strict mode is enforced
6. Never create React Context for auth - use useAuthStore
7. Never call useMyStore() without a selector function
8. Never import { z } from 'zod' - must be zod/v4
9. Never use export default from component files in src/ (app/ screens are the exception)
10. Never call fetch() directly - use api from @/services/api
11. Never add keys to only en.json without also updating ar.json
12. Never skip accessibilityRole and accessibilityLabel on interactive elements
13. Never import from implementation file - use barrel (Button not Button/Button)
14. Never use console.log in production code - guard with if (__DEV__)

## Commit Format

<type>(<scope>): <subject>

Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert

Examples:
feat(products): add product listing with search
fix(button): correct dark mode disabled color
test(input): add validation error display tests

## Commands

npm start               Start Expo dev server
npm run ios             iOS simulator
npm run android         Android emulator
npm run type-check      TypeScript check (must pass zero errors)
npm run lint            ESLint
npm run lint:fix        Auto-fix ESLint
npm run format          Prettier
npm run validate        All checks (type-check + lint + format:check)
npm test                Jest
npm run test:coverage   Coverage report

## Documentation Files

CONVENTIONS.md              Complete coding conventions (source of truth)
AGENTS.md                   Universal agent instructions (this is a complementary file)
docs/AI-GUIDE.md            Pattern cookbook with 10 step-by-step recipes and file templates
docs/COMPONENTS.md          Full API reference for all 33 components with prop tables
docs/llms.txt               This file - plain text LLM context
.cursorrules                Cursor IDE rules
.cursor/rules/project.mdc   Cursor MDC format rules
.windsurfrules              Windsurf/Codeium rules
.clinerules                 Cline rules
.github/copilot-instructions.md  GitHub Copilot instructions
CLAUDE.md                   Claude Code project instructions
